1826290.name: WWII Tanks: Battlefield
1826290.description:
Immerse yourself in a world of armored tank battles. Choose from a wide range of famous tanks of
the major combatants. Pick the best tank and blast your way across the battlefield. Defeat your enemies
with force and strategic decisions! And lead your team on a glorious road to victory!

Game Features:

Wide selection of famous WWII tanks:

Germany:

  • Tiger 1
  • Panzer-IV
  • Sdkfz251
  • Mörser Karl

USSR:

  • T-34/76
  • T-34/85
  • KV-I
  • KV-II
  • BT-7
  • T-35

Japan:

  • Type 89

United Kingdom:

  • Cromwell
  • Sherman Firefly
and many more.

Missions:

  • Battle of Stalingrad - Attack
  • Battle of Stalingrad - Defense
  • Escort Mission - Berlin
  • Escort Mission - Berlin (General)
  • Battle of Kursk - Axis
  • Battle of Kursk - Allied
  • Speed Battle - Berlin
  • Escape from Berlin
1826290.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
